--- 
title: "TAPS 2026 National Workshop Notes"
author: ""
date: "2026-04-02"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
---

# Welcome 

## Morning 

About the instructor, [Dr. Josefina Lacasa](https://jlacasa.github.io/). 

Workshop notes and R code for Design of Experiments for the TAPS national workshop at Kansas State University on April 2, 2026.

## Afternoon 

About the instructor, [Dr. Trevor Hefley](https://sites.google.com/view/trevorhefleyresearch/home). 

See Workshop notes and R code for Spatial and Time-series Analysis for the TAPS national workshop at Kansas State University on April 2, 2026 [here](https://019d4be5-1940-b4d4-bf2f-01c12b4cc2a8.share.connect.posit.cloud/index.html).

## Acknowledgements 

This Workshop wouldn't have been possible without the support from the [Kansas Water Institute](https://www.k-state.edu/engagement/innovation-and-partnerships/interdisciplinary-institutes/water-institute/) and the [Institute for Digital Ag and Advanced Analytics](https://www.k-state.edu/engagement/innovation-and-partnerships/interdisciplinary-institutes/digital-ag-advanced-analytics/).   

```{r echo=FALSE, out.width= "35%", fig.align='center', fig.cap="Acknowledgements", fig.show='hold'}
knitr::include_graphics("figures/kwi.png")

knitr::include_graphics("figures/ID3A.png")

```
